name: OpenGuardrails MCP Server
what_it_does: OpenGuardrails MCP server enabling AI agents to apply safety guardrails — validating agent outputs for harmful content, checking responses against configurable safety policies, enforcing content restrictions, and integrating AI safety controls into agent-driven applications requiring responsible AI guardrails.
use_cases: Validating agent outputs for harmful or unsafe content from safety agents
Enforcing content policies in agent response pipelines from compliance agents
Checking for PII exposure in agent outputs from privacy protection agents
Implementing responsible AI guardrails in production agent systems
Moderating content in user-facing AI applications from moderation agents
Auditing agent behavior against safety policies from governance agents
not_for: Teams without content safety requirements (adds latency overhead)
Real-time applications where guardrail latency is unacceptable
100% guaranteed safety (no guardrail system is perfect)
best_when: An agent system needs configurable content safety controls — validating outputs against harm policies and preventing unsafe content in production agent applications.
avoid_when: Your use case has no content safety requirements, or you need guaranteed low latency where guardrail overhead is unacceptable.

auth.notes: Local guardrails server. May require external model API keys depending on validation approach. Check repository for current requirements.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free and open source; external model API costs may apply
pricing.notes: Free open source guardrails MCP. External model API costs apply if using LLM-based safety checks.

performance.rate_limits: Local — depends on safety check implementation

known_agent_gotchas: Guardrail quality depends on configured policies — false positive/negative rates vary
Community project — safety claims should be independently validated for production use
Adds latency to every checked operation — measure impact on your workflow
No guardrail system is 100% effective — defense in depth still required
Early-stage project — API may change significantly
Policy configuration complexity varies by use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local guardrail validation. Community MCP. Safety system — validate independently before production use. No perfect safety guarantee. Apply defense in depth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local validation. Community safety tool — validate independently. No perfect guarantee. Community MCP.
